summary: Iteration 255 — NC (Nota di Credito) Line Persistence Bug Fix verification complete. All 8 test cases passed. The bug where NC lines were not persisted after save (deleting 2 of 3 lines would show all 3 on reopen) has been fixed. Root cause: for non-bozza documents, frontend only sent metadata and backend blocked structural changes. Fix: NC documents now bypass these restrictions via isNC check in frontend (line 381-382) and is_nc check in backend (line 486-490).
seed_data_creation: Test invoices created and cleaned up automatically via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: NC line persistence bug fix verified. The fix adds isNC check at InvoiceEditorPage.js:381-382 (frontend sends lines for NC regardless of status) and is_nc check at invoices.py:486-490 (backend allows structural changes for NC). FT documents still correctly block line changes when status is not bozza.

test_nc_inviata_sdi_accepts_line_changes.description: NC with status 'inviata_sdi' accepts line changes (3 lines -> 1 line) and persists them

test_nc_bozza_accepts_line_changes.description: NC with status 'bozza' accepts line changes (regression test)

test_ft_inviata_sdi_rejects_line_changes.description: FT with status 'inviata_sdi' correctly rejects line changes with 400 error

test_ft_bozza_accepts_line_changes.description: FT with status 'bozza' accepts line changes (regression test)

test_nc_emessa_accepts_line_changes.description: NC with status 'emessa' accepts line changes

test_ft_emessa_rejects_line_changes.description: FT with status 'emessa' correctly rejects line changes with 400 error

test_ft_inviata_sdi_allows_metadata_upda.description: FT with inviata_sdi allows metadata updates (notes, payment_method) even though lines are blocked

test_nc_inviata_sdi_allows_both_lines_an.description: NC with inviata_sdi allows both line and metadata updates

frontend_fix.change: Added isNC check: const isNC = formData.document_type === 'NC'; if (isNonDraft && !isNC) { ... }

backend_fix.change: Added is_nc check: is_nc = existing.get('document_type') == 'NC'; if not is_draft and not is_nc: { block structural changes }

bug_rca.issue: NC (Nota di Credito) lines were not being persisted after save. When user deleted 2 of 3 lines and saved, reopening the NC would show all 3 original lines.
bug_rca.root_cause: For non-bozza documents, frontend only sent metadata (not lines) in handleSave, and backend blocked structural changes (lines, tax_settings, etc.) for non-draft documents.
bug_rca.fix: NC documents are now always editable for lines regardless of status. Frontend sends lines when editing NC regardless of status. Backend allows structural changes for NC documents.
reproduction_steps: 2. Emit the NC (status changes from bozza to emessa)
3. Send to SDI (status changes to inviata_sdi)
4. Edit the NC and delete 2 lines, keeping only 1
6. Reopen the NC - before fix: 3 lines shown; after fix: 1 line shown
